name: Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry study
summary: A single-arm phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov registry study of intravenous AAV-hTERT for aging, with unknown status and no posted results.

trial_details.expected_results_window: Result timing is not clear from local records; surveillance should verify the registry before this appears in a field review.
trial_details.horizon_note: No posted results are represented locally, so surveillance should watch for registry results or linked publications.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Telomerase Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes safety, biomarkers, and function in Adults aged 45 years or older. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
